learnings.root_cause: Fixture 'tempo_stack' calls TempoStack(kind_dict=tempo_stack_dict) but the ocp-resources TempoStack class no longer accepts keyword arguments — its constructor API changed in a library update. All four guardrails-with-HuggingFace-detectors tests share this fixture and fail identically during setup.
learnings.recommendation: Update the 'tempo_stack' fixture in tests/model_explainability/guardrails/conftest.py to use the new TempoStack constructor API. Replace TempoStack(kind_dict=...) with the current instantiation pattern (e.g., positional dict or a class-method factory). Pin or update ocp-resources to a version whose TempoStack class accepts kind_dict.

learnings.key_error: TypeError: wait_for_mariadb_operator_deployments() got an unexpected keyword argument 'client'  [tests/conftest.py:732]
learnings.root_cause: The 'mariadb_operator_cr' fixture in tests/conftest.py:732 calls wait_for_mariadb_operator_deployments(mariadb_operator=..., client=admin_client) but the utility function no longer accepts the 'client' keyword argument — its signature was changed in a recent refactor. This is a call-site/API-contract mismatch between the global conftest and the utility layer.
learnings.recommendation: In tests/conftest.py line ~732, remove the client=admin_client keyword argument from the wait_for_mariadb_operator_deployments() call to match the updated function signature. If the function still needs the client internally, update the function definition to re-accept and use it, or retrieve the client inside the function directly.
